label: Better Stack
description: Connect to Better Stack to query logs, monitor uptime, and manage on-call incidents from a single platform.

form.title: Connect Better Stack
form.subtitle: Paste your Better Stack team API token to enable log, uptime, and on-call access.

methods.label: API Token
methods.description: Paste your team API token from Better Stack Account settings. The fastest way to connect — no OAuth setup required.
methods.how_to:
## Connect with a Better Stack API Token

Better Stack issues per-team API tokens that grant access to Logs, Uptime, and On-Call APIs.

### Steps

1. Log in to [Better Stack](https://betterstack.com) and open your team workspace.
2. Click your avatar or team name in the top-right corner → **Account settings**.
3. Navigate to the **API tokens** section in the left sidebar.
4. Click **Create new token**, give it a descriptive name like `Anton`, and click **Create**.
5. Copy the token shown — it is only displayed once.
6. Paste it into the **API Token** field below.

### Notes

- The token grants access to all Better Stack products (Logs, Uptime, On-Call) for the team it belongs to.
- If you manage multiple teams, generate a token from each team's settings separately.
- To revoke access, return to **Account settings → API tokens** and delete the token.
- If the token is lost before copying, delete it and create a fresh one.

fields.name: api_token
fields.label: API Token
fields.placeholder: Paste your Better Stack API token
fields.description: Found in Better Stack → Account settings → API tokens. Shown once at creation time.

fields.name: team_name

fields.description: Optional label to identify which Better Stack team this token belongs to.
